metadata.name: GZMO Chaos Engine
metadata.description: Lorenz attractor-driven identity evolution engine. Ports the gzmo-chaos Rust crate as a native OpenClaw plugin with real-time LLM temperature modulation, Thought Cabinet crystallization, and autonomous trigger system.

gravity.description: Base gravitational constant — controls energy drain rate

friction.description: Base friction coefficient — scales energy drain

seed.description: Initial seed for the Lorenz attractor and Logistic Map

bpm.description: Heartbeat frequency in beats per minute (174 = original Drum & Bass tempo)

proxyPort.description: Local port for the Ollama temperature proxy

snapshotPath.description: Path for periodic snapshot file output

enableProxy.description: Enable the Ollama temperature override proxy
